Keras Architecture Parameters

Source: R/class_definitions.R
keras_architecture_parameters-class.Rd

Class to encapsulate parameters for constructing a Keras neural network architecture.

Slots

units

A numeric vector specifying the number of units (neurons) for each layer.

n_layers

A numeric value representing the total number of layers in the model.

activation

A character vector containing the activation functions for each layer.

nn_optimizer

A character string indicating the optimization algorithm used (length = 1).

batch_norm_option

A character vector specifying whether to apply batch normalization for each layer.

Developed by Paulo Guimaraes.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
